title: Connectors
description: Connect your third-party apps to import your activities.
notConfigured: Connectors are not enabled on this instance.

strava.disconnectDescription: Your tokens will be deleted and your Strava account will be revoked. You can reconnect at any time.
strava.errorMessage: Your Strava access has expired or been revoked. Reconnect your account to resume automatic import.
strava.errorBannerText: Automatic import is suspended. Reconnect your account to import new activities.
